C1.title: Application Programming Interface (API) Economy Global Market Report 2026
C1.claim: API economy market $17.13B in 2025 -> $20.21B in 2026 (CAGR 17.9%) -> $38.73B by 2030

C2.title: API Management Market Trends: Cloud Integration, Microservices Growth & Forecast to 2034

C3.title: 2025 State of the API Report
C3.claim: 65% of organisations generate revenue from APIs (+3pts YoY); 46% planning increased investment; 24.3% of developers designing APIs for AI agents; 51% of organisations have deployed AI agents; 51% of developers worry about unauthorised AI-agent API calls

C4.title: Mastering Contract-First API Development
C4.publisher: Moesif (citing Postman 2024 State of the API)
C4.claim: API-first orgs: 40% faster integration cycles, 35% fewer defects; contract-test automation cuts integration-test time by up to 60%

C5.title: South Africa Digital Banking and Open Finance Market 2019-2030
C5.claim: SA embedded finance ZAR 292m (2025) -> ZAR 3.95bn (2030) at 7.8% CAGR; SA digital banking + open finance TAM USD 5bn

C6.title: South Africa's National Payment System: PSP licences and the 2026 payments reform
C6.publisher: FacePhi / regulatory tracker; primary text on SARB site
C6.claim: SARB Exemption Notice + Directive published 3 March 2025, PSD2-modelled, eight payment-service categories, final rules expected Q3 2025

C7.title: South Africa's Stitch raises $55 million Series B funding
C7.claim: Stitch raised $55m Series B (Apr 2025); $107m total in four years; ISO 27001 + PCI DSS Level 1; named customers Takealot, Mr D, MTN, Vodacom, Standard Bank's Shyft, TFG's Bash, Hollywoodbets, Luno, The Courier Guy; pay-by-bank rails for Capitec Pay, Absa Pay, Nedbank Direct EFT

C8.title: PayShap: South Africa's real-time payments scheme
C8.claim: PayShap launched March 2023; cloud + open API + microservices; ISO 20022 compliant; adoption growing but skewed to younger users

C9.title: Akamai 2024 API Security Impact Study; State of the Internet: Securing Apps 2024
C9.claim: 150bn API attacks Jan 2023 - Dec 2024; 84% of security pros had an API incident in 12 months; avg US$591,404 per incident; web attacks up 33% YoY; OWASP API Top 10 incidents up 32% YoY

C10.title: Salt Security State of API Security Report 2H 2025; Q1 2025 report
C10.claim: 681% YoY rise in API attack traffic vs 321% rise in API call volume; 99% of orgs had an API security issue in 12 months; 95% of API attacks from authenticated sources; 80% lack continuous real-time API monitoring

C11.title: API Integration Cost: The True Price of Building In-House
C11.claim: Single hand-coded integration: 3-6 months engineering, $10k-$50k baseline, advanced >$150k; 10 in-house integrations over 2yrs: $500k-$873k; maintenance 30-40% of TCO; iPaaS / unified-API delivers 1-2 wks for first integrations

C12.title: Webhook Reliability Patterns; Mastering Webhook Retry Logic
C12.claim: Exponential backoff with jitter (delay = initial * mult^retry + random_jitter); jitter alone reduces synchronised retry spikes by >80%; queue-backed dispatch + DLQ; Stripe / GitHub / Shopify use similar schedules

C13.title: PCI DSS 4.0 / 4.0.1: Web App & API Security Controls
C13.publisher: Qualys; F5; Cequence; Akamai (industry compliance analyses)
C13.claim: PCI DSS 4.0 effective 1 April 2025; Req 6.5.6 explicitly covers APIs (BOLA, broken function-level auth, data exposure); Req 6.3.2 component inventory; gateways must log every request/response, enforce rate limits, validate input

C14.title: SARB Cybersecurity and Cyber-Resilience Directive (NPS Directive 1 of 2024)
C14.claim: Effective 1 June 2025; 2-hour RTO for critical systems (max 8 hours); 24-hour incident notification; 48-hour written report; ISO 27001 + NIST CSF v2 alignment; MFA, encryption, SIEM, access-control policies baseline

C15.title: KYC Automation in Fintech: Digital Onboarding & Compliance; KYC API for Fintech
C15.publisher: SecureKloud; Moody's KYC; KYCAID (industry case-study aggregation)
C15.claim: KYC API integration: 90% onboarding-time reduction (24h -> minutes); 40-60% cost savings; 50% reduction in fraudulent registrations

C16.title: Point-to-point integration challenges; CRM-ERP integration patterns
C16.publisher: Codeless Platforms; KPC Team; ERP Today (industry consensus)
C16.claim: Point-to-point integration: brittle, breaks on every schema change; unmanageable at scale; data silos; one platform update can break the whole connection

C17.title: OpenTelemetry Observability 2026 Complete Guide; The Node.js Observability Stack in 2026
C17.claim: OpenTelemetry is baseline standard; traces+metrics+logs with correlation; histogram bucket boundaries set to SLO (e.g., 500ms for p99); causation not just correlation across service boundaries

C18.title: Building a Scalable Rate Limiting System: Token Bucket vs Leaky Bucket
C18.publisher: DEV Community; ByteByteGo; Eraser Decision Node (industry consensus)
C18.claim: Token bucket: bursts allowed up to capacity; default for most API rate limiting. Leaky bucket: fixed output rate, suited to traffic shaping. Redis recommended for distributed rate limiting in production

C19.title: Designing Scalable API Onboarding Frameworks for Large Partner Ecosystems
C19.publisher: Industry case-study aggregation (Medium + Postman 2023 SOTI citation)
C19.claim: Fintech partner onboarding 14 days -> 3 hours via Swagger-based docs; 8 weeks -> ~1 week with scalable onboarding framework; centralised docs cut onboarding by 75% (Postman 2023 SOTI); API-first cuts integration costs 37%

C20.title: Designing robust and predictable APIs with idempotency
C20.claim: Idempotency keys: V4 UUIDs, 24-hour TTL; generated client-side never server-side; exponential backoff on retries; parameter consistency enforced; eliminates double-charge bug class; <2ms overhead per request (industry case)

C21.title: Receive Stripe events in your webhook endpoint; Stripe Webhook Best Practices
C21.claim: Stripe at-least-once delivery, retries with exponential backoff up to 72 hours; signature verification mandatory; event.id dedup with UNIQUE constraint; return 200 within 20s then process async; verify signature on raw body

C22.title: 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for iPaaS
C22.publisher: Gartner (excerpted by Boomi / Workato / NJC Labs)
C22.claim: Boomi: Leader (11th consecutive); Workato: Leader; SAP, Microsoft, Informatica: Leaders; MuleSoft (Salesforce): Challenger in iPaaS, still Leader in API Management (9 years)

C23.title: Synthesis Payments Centre of Excellence
C23.claim: Synthesis is an SA enterprise software firm with a dedicated Payments Centre of Excellence serving banks and fintechs on high-value low-volume payments processing

C24.title: Best Payment Gateway South Africa: Ultimate Guide to the Top 5
C24.claim: SA gateway leaders: PayFast, Peach Payments, Yoco, Ozow, PayGate. PayFast 96.5% transaction success rate; Peach 98.5%; Yoco POS-led expanding to online; pricing 2.55%-3.40% range

C25.title: OWASP API Security Top 10 (2023): API1:2023 Broken Object-Level Authorization
C25.claim: BOLA is #1 API security risk; present in ~40% of all API attacks; every endpoint accepting object IDs must perform continuous authorisation checks throughout the session

C26.title: South Africa: Amendments to POPIA Regulations 2025
C26.claim: POPIA Amendment Regulations 2025 published 17 April 2025, immediate effect; simplified processes for data-subject objections, corrections, deletions, direct-marketing consent; security compromises reported as soon as reasonably certain

C27.title: Circuit Breaker Pattern: Hystrix to Resilience4j migration
C27.claim: Circuit breaker pattern (Closed / Open / Half-Open) prevents cascading failures; Resilience4j is modern Java replacement for maintenance-mode Hystrix; layer with retry, rate limiter, bulkhead for full resilience

C28.title: OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token Rotation Best Practices
C28.claim: Access tokens 15-60min; refresh tokens 7-14 days with rotation; reuse detection invalidates token family on suspected compromise; HS256/RS256 signing; refresh tokens in HTTP-only cookies never localStorage; MFA recommended

primary_sources_named: Salt Security State of API Security 2H 2025
Akamai SOTI / API Security Impact Study 2024

minimum_viable_research_floor_met.pain_points: 12 pains across 4 ICP segments (floor 3 x 2) - PASS
minimum_viable_research_floor_met.regulatory_framing: 6 frameworks cited - POPIA, PCI-DSS 4.0, GDPR, SARB 1/2024, PSD2/SA-open-banking, OWASP API Top 10 - PASS
